title: JCRAFT PVP
description: A modpack optimized for PVP combat, mainly on the Beta PVP server
body:
[Official JCraft: Eyes of Ender Discord server](https://discord.gg/mgE3gpH9d2)

## Features:
- JCraft: Eyes of Ender for the GREAT modded PVP experience based on JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
- Lower fire resource pack to improve vision while fighting
- Distant Horizons to see further than your render distance, purely aesthetical
- Health bars over entities to get information on the go
- Optimization for performance and lag
- Inventory utilities: InvMove and Inventory profiles
- More i'm forgetting fs
